name: takoqa
description: A swarm of browser agents that breaks your web app before your users do. Plain-language missions in, real bugs out.
author: Seiji Sakurai

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/oracles.test.ts test/engine.test.ts test/report.test.ts test/knowledge.test.ts test/findings.test.ts test/agent.test.ts test/progress.test.ts test/baseline.test.ts test/learned.test.ts test/discover.test.ts test/explore.test.ts test/planner.test.ts test/exploreLoop.test.ts test/matrix.test.ts test/security.test.ts test/authz-differential.test.ts test/routeSource.test.ts test/selfeval.test.ts test/evalLedger.test.ts test/metaeval.test.ts test/observe.test.ts test/act.test.ts test/serverLog.test.ts
